title: NIGHT STRIKE - 211info
text: PORTLAND NIGHT STRIKE NIGHT STRIKE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides access to grooming and personal hygiene supplies; haircuts and foot washing; a hot meal; and an opportunity to have clothing and sleeping bags replaced. All resources are available on a first-come, first-served basis. Also provides volunteer opportunities. 214 W Burnside Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: People experiencing homelessness Hours: Thursdays 7:30pm-9:30pm aside from 1st and 2nd Thursdays in June; 4th Thursday in November; 2nd Thursday in December; 1st Thursday in January Get Directions Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Resources: Walk in -Volunteer opportunities: Visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located under the Burnside Bridge on the park side of Naito Parkway Services: Camping Gear Community Meals General Clothing Provision Hair and Nail Care Personal/Grooming Supplies Street Outreach Programs Volunteer Opportunities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND NIGHT STRIKE
